title: Day 45 Lesson 4 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these sentences:

Sentence 1 - これは　どういう　いみですか。= What does this mean?

Sentence 2 - たちいりきんしは　はいっては　いけないと　いう　いみです。= "Tachi Iri Kinshi" means that it is not allowed to go in here.

Sentence 3 - せんせいも　その　へやに　はいっては　いけないと　いって　いましたよ。= The teacher told us to go into this room as well.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard. Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
